name: octo-apm-service-errors
description: Trace Explorer query for error traces across app and platform services. Use with service-error-triage in Log Analytics.
queryText: show (traces) TraceStatus as Status, TraceFirstSpanStartTime as "Start Time", TraceId, ServiceName as Service, OperationName as Operation, TraceDuration as Duration, ErrorCount as "Span Errors" where ServiceName in ('octo-drone-shop','octo-drone-shop-oke','enterprise-crm-portal','enterprise-crm-portal-oke','octo-java-app-server','octo-java-app-server-oke','octo-workflow-gateway','octo-workflow-gateway-oke','octo-async-worker','octo-load-control','octo-browser-runner','octo-object-pipeline','octo-remediator') and ErrorCount > 0
